base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ramza_delita_agrias — a character (playable) from 1997 final fantasy tactics. Main story chars — Ramza Beoulve (protagonist), Delita Heiral (childhood friend / later King), Agrias Oaks (Holy Knight), Ovelia (princess). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
